title: ERYX-4
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Eryx-4.jpg|thumb]]
'''ERYX-4''' was an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] who worked with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Gyran]]. It was outfitted with a [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]], [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] launcher, [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] motion system, and a [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] system interface.
